ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bills" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the bill */,
  "introduced_date" TEXT /* Date the bill was introduced */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the sponsor */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the bill */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the legislative session in which the bill was introduced */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bill */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the bill's status was updated */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee to which the bill is assigned */,
  "enactment_date" TEXT /* Date the bill was enacted, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_sponsor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsor_id") REFERENCES sponsors ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "chamber" TEXT /* Chamber in which the sponsor serves */,
  "district" TEXT /* District represented by the sponsor */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party of the sponsor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the sponsor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sponsor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill the action pertains to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the action occurred */,
  "chamber" TEXT /* Chamber where the action occurred */,
  "journal_page" INTEGER /* Journal page where the action is recorded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the action */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee where the action occurred, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_chamber FOREIGN KEY ("chamber") REFERENCES chambers ("chamber_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chambers" (
  "chamber_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chamber */,
  "chamber_name" TEXT /* Name of the chamber */,
  "presiding_officer" TEXT /* Presiding officer of the chamber */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the chamber */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chamber_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the journal entry */,
  "chamber_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chamber */,
  "page" INTEGER /* Page number in the journal */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the journal entry */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume number of the journal */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue number of the journal */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the online version of the journal entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journals_chamber_id FOREIGN KEY ("chamber_id") REFERENCES chambers ("chamber_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill the document pertains to */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., amendment, fiscal note) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who uploaded the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_records" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting record */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill voted on */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the vote */,
  "chamber_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chamber where the vote occurred */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the vote */,
  "yeas" INTEGER /* Number of yeas */,
  "nays" INTEGER /* Number of nays */,
  "abstentions" INTEGER /* Number of abstentions */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast */,
  "present" INTEGER /* Number of members present during the vote */,
  "absent" INTEGER /* Number of members absent during the vote */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_records_chamber_id FOREIGN KEY ("chamber_id") REFERENCES chambers ("chamber_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_records_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committees" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee */,
  "committee_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee */,
  "chamber_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chamber */,
  "chairperson_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chairperson */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the committee's purpose */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the committee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committees_chamber_id FOREIGN KEY ("chamber_id") REFERENCES chambers ("chamber_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committees_chairperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("chairperson_id") REFERENCES sponsors ("sponsor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committee_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee member */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsor serving as a committee member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the member in the committee */,
  "term_start" TEXT /* Start date of the member's term */,
  "term_end" TEXT /* End date of the member's term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committee_members_sponsor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsor_id") REFERENCES sponsors ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committee_members_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hearings" (
  "hearing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hearing */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee holding the hearing */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the hearing */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the hearing */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the hearing */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the hearing */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the hearing */,
  "transcript_url" TEXT /* URL to the transcript of the hearing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hearing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hearings_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "witnesses" (
  "witness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each witness */,
  "hearing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hearing */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the witness */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the witness */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the witness */,
  "testimony_url" TEXT /* URL to the witness's testimony */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("witness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_witnesses_hearing_id FOREIGN KEY ("hearing_id") REFERENCES hearings ("hearing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "upvotes" INTEGER /* Number of upvotes the comment has received */,
  "downvotes" INTEGER /* Number of downvotes the comment has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_comments_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., public, staff, legislator) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
